channel.title: Posts on AI Tools Comparison
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on AI Tools Comparison

item.title: Best Cheap AI Plans 2026
item.description:
“AI is expensive” was true in 2023. In 2026, the landscape has flipped — you can run a full content workflow, design assets, and even edit video for under $50/mo total across 3-4 tools. Here’s every cheap plan worth your time.

🏆 Best Overall: $12/mo — Simplified Pro

Simplified gives you AI writing, design, social scheduling, and brand kits in one dashboard. The Pro plan at $12/mo covers what would cost $40+ across separate tools. Best for solo creators and small teams who want one tool instead of five.

item.title: AI Tools Under $10/mo: The Complete Guide for 2026
item.description:
The sub-$10 AI market is surprisingly deep in 2026. Free tiers are generous, entry-level paid plans are cheap, and the quality gap between “budget” and “premium” has nearly disappeared for most tasks. Here’s exactly what you get at each price point.

🆓 $0/mo Free Tiers (Worth Using)

Canva Free — 50 AI images/month

Canva’s free tier now includes 50 AI image generations using their Magic Media tool. Also includes basic text-to-image and AI photo editing. Enough for most casual users.
